title: Incorrect Heap Property Enforcement During Rebalancing Leads to Wrong Results

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: An array of integers representing elements to be inserted into a binary max heap.
statement.outputFormat: True if the binary max heap is valid, False otherwise.
statement.notes: Note that the binary max heap must satisfy the heap property, i.e., the parent node is greater than or equal to its child node for all nodes.

constraints.description: Maximum allowed value in the array

examples.explanation: The array 3 5 8 2 is a valid binary max heap.
The array 2 3 5 7 1 is not a valid binary max heap because the parent node 3 is not greater than its child node 2.
The array [1] is a valid binary max heap.

hints.text: Understand the heap property and how to enforce it during rebalancing.

editorial.title: Incorrect Heap Property Enforcement During Rebalancing Leads to Wrong Results
editorial.intuition: To enforce the heap property, we need to ensure that the parent node is greater than or equal to its child node for all nodes. This can be achieved by performing a bottom-up heapify operation after rebalancing the heap.
editorial.bruteForce: Checking the heap property for each node individually, resulting in a time complexity of O(n^2).
editorial.optimalSolution: We can enforce the heap property during rebalancing by performing a bottom-up heapify operation, resulting in a time complexity of O(n log n) due to the heapify operation.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The optimal solution is correct because it ensures that the heap property is enforced during rebalancing, resulting in a valid binary max heap.
editorial.dryRun: Step-by-step example run of the optimal solution.
commonMistakes: Failing to enforce the heap property during rebalancing

starterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: bool solve(vectorint>& nums); };
starterCode.java: public class Solution { public boolean solve(int[] nums); }
starterCode.python: class Solution: def solve(self, nums: list[int]) -> bool:
